reason: Frontend Pre-Development Checklist + Quality Check entry point. Walk this before signing off implementation.
Authoritative quality gate: flutter analyze must be 0 issues, dart format . must produce 0 diff, tests must pass. Defines what 'clean' means for this repo.

Verify the newly added 'Save CTA gated by preview-ready state' convention matches the existing five-section structure (What / Why / Example / When to apply / Required tests). Cross-check against the 'Expensive-preview sliders submit on onChangeEnd' precedent for tone consistency.

Verify canSaveProvider follows the sealed-state derivation pattern (no AsyncValue, single-layer `is` check) and respects the autoDispose vs non-autoDispose lifecycle split. Confirm no new caches or provider families introduced.
Confirm sealed-class consumer is exhaustive when needed, narrowing-only when deriving boolean. Spot check on null safety / Dart 3 patterns.

Cross-check every acceptance criterion in the Acceptance Criteria list against the actual implementation + tests. Ensure the Out of Scope items truly stayed untouched (ExportController.save / PreviewController internals / editor screens).
